subcodes.first_line: O thou glorious martyr, Hand of the Cause of God! For some time no word, nor trace, nor message from thee hath reached us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشهید المجید ایادی امرالله مدتیست که از شما نه خبری نه اثری نه پیامی نه
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
